body:
## Rationale

All three drummers are **GA4 top pages this run** (2026-06-27):
- Mario Duplantier: 10 page views (GA4 #3 page this week)
- Ben Koller: 8 page views / 8 users (GA4 #4 page this week, strong engagement)
- Hellhammer: 6 page views (GA4 top-6 this week)

None appear in gearPriceHistory (15 entries: lars, joey, dave-lombardo, mike-portnoy, gene-hoglan, danny-carey, tomas-haake, pete-sandoval, vinnie-paul, igor-cavalera, nicko-mcbrain, matt-greiner, charlie-benante, nick-menza, inferno).
NOT in any open gear price history proposals (batches 18-23 confirmed).

## Pages to Create

### Page 1: `/drummers/mario-duplantier/gear-history`
- **Era timeline:** Terra Incognita era (2001) → From Mars to Sirius era (2005) → L'Enfant Sauvage era (2012) → Fortitude era (2021)
- **Narrative:** Evolution from budget French metal kit → Tama Starclassic → custom touring setup
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/gear-history/mario-duplantier.md`
- **Data:** add `mario-duplantier` to gearPriceHistoryDrummers in `api/sitemap.js`

### Page 2: `/drummers/hellhammer/gear-history`
- **Era timeline:** Deathcrush era (1987) → De Mysteriis Dom Sathanas era (1994) → Ordo Ad Chao era (2007) → Daemon era (2019)
- **Narrative:** Raw black metal minimalism → gradual refinement; Tama/Paiste setup evolution
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/gear-history/hellhammer.md`

### Page 3: `/drummers/ben-koller/gear-history`
- **Era timeline:** Jane Doe era (2001) → You Fail Me era (2004) → Axe to Fall era (2009) → The Dusk in Us era (2017)
- **Narrative:** Hardcore/mathcore DIY approach; kit evolution tracking Converge's progression
- **LLM file:** `/public/llms/gear-history/ben-koller.md`

## Data shape (follows existing gearPriceHistoryDrummers pattern)

Add to `/api/sitemap.js` gearPriceHistoryDrummers array:
```
'mario-duplantier',  // Terra Incognita era (2001)
'hellhammer',        // Deathcrush era (1987)
'ben-koller',        // Jane Doe era (2001)
```

Ensure `/packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` or equivalent gear-history data module has entries.

## Quality Gate
- ≥300 words per page
- ≥3 time-period "eras" with price estimates per drummer
- ≥3 internal links per page
- Timeline/table format with inflation-adjusted estimates where possible
- LLM .md file with structured data

## Estimated Organic Uplift
GA4-signal drummers → immediate engagement uplift; gear history format serves "how much did [drummer]'s kit cost in [year]" LLM query pattern. Builds on existing cluster strength.

## Verify
1. All 3 slugs in gearPriceHistoryDrummers in sitemap.js
2. All 3 pages render at /drummers/<slug>/gear-history
3. All 3 LLM .md files exist in /public/llms/gear-history/
4. Sitemap.xml includes all 3 URLs
5. Price history data has ≥3 era entries per drummer

## Done
- [ ] mario-duplantier, hellhammer, ben-koller added to gearPriceHistoryDrummers
- [ ] 3 gear-history data entries created
- [ ] 3 LLM .md files created
- [ ] All 3 pages render
title: SEO batch: Gear price history batch 24 — Mario Duplantier + Hellhammer + Ben Koller (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
